title: SubscribeInput
description: Main-surface input for subscribe. FR-011, FR-013. No inbound webhook field — harness never operates as receiver.

params.description: Adapter-specific subscription parameters (e.g. region filter for CBS, feed URL template for RSS).

lifetime_seconds.description: Bounded lifetime required (FR-011). Ceiling = 365 days. Harness releases resources on expiry or explicit cancel (FR-014).
